data.title: Health Canada grants Quantum BioPharma a product license (PN 80144141) for Qlarity™, enhancing energy and cognitive performance.
data.description: In Toronto on September 18, 2025, Quantum BioPharma Ltd. received a Product License (PN 80144141) from Health Canada for their natural health product, Qlarity. The biopharmaceutical company, listed on NASDAQ as QNTM, CSE as QNTM, and FRA as 0K91, focuses on developing treatments for neurodegenerative and metabolic disorders, as well as alcohol misuse disorders. Their product Qlarity, previously available in the US under the brand unbuzzd™, has been granted permission for sale in Canada. Quantum BioPharma has a range of drug candidates in various stages of development to address these challenging health issues.

data.title: First Fed Bank in Wilmington, NC launches Apiture Digital Banking Platform for elevated business banking experience.
data.description: A new digital banking platform by Apiture has been launched for First Fed Bank in Wilmington, North Carolina, to provide an upgraded business banking experience. This move aims to enhance customer satisfaction and efficiency with modern banking services.

data.title: Videojet to showcase innovative coding and marking solutions at PACK EXPO Las Vegas 2025.
data.description: Videojet will be featuring advanced coding, marking, and printing technologies at PACK EXPO Las Vegas 2025. The event will take place in Chicago and will present the latest innovations in these areas.

data.title: Astira Capital Partners acquired Altus, a commercial receivables leader from ARMStrong Receivable Management under BharCap.
data.description: Astira Capital Partners, a private equity firm specializing in technology-enabled and data-driven services, has finalized the acquisition of Altus Commercial Receivables. Altus, a prominent provider of commercial receivables management solutions, was acquired from ARMStrong Receivable Management, a company within the BharCap Partners, LLC portfolio. Altus is recognized for its leadership in this sector, offering businesses innovative solutions to tackle various challenges.

data.title: Buffalo Sabres partner with Evolv Technologies for security with AI-based solution in KeyBank Center 2025 upgrades.
data.description: Evolv Technologies Holdings, Inc. revealed that the Buffalo Sabres, a team in the National Hockey League, have committed to a multi-year subscription agreement for the implementation of Evolv Express® at KeyBank Center in WALTHAM, Mass. This strategic move by the leading security tech company (NASDAQ: EVLV) aims to enhance safety through AI-based solutions. KeyBank Center, the team's downtown arena since 1996, underwent recent infrastructure enhancements ahead of the 202X season.

data.title: Strike Graph unveils 2025 AI in Compliance Report, showing a gap between regulations and organizational confidence. Top concerns: potential errors (63%) and data security issues (50.5%).
data.description: In Seattle today, Strike Graph, an AI-driven compliance management platform, unveiled the results of its 2025 State of AI in Compliance Report. The report exposed a concerning gap between the increasing intricacy of regulatory structures and companies' assurance in handling them. The report highlights that the top worries for individuals integrating AI into compliance operations are potential mistakes, cited by 63% of respondents, and data security problems, cited by 50.5%. This may be the reason why only a limited percentage of respondents feel confident in managing these challenges.

data.title: Uber partners with Flytrex for drone delivery, marking Uber’s first drone investment. Expected to start in Uber Eats pilot markets in the U.S. by year-end.
data.description: In San Francisco, Uber Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: UBER) and Flytrex, Inc. unveiled a strategic alliance and Uber's initial foray into drone delivery, highlighting a significant advancement in autonomous logistics. The partnership is set to kick off with Uber Eats trial runs in select U.S. markets later this year. The collaboration integrates Flytrex's successful autonomous drone delivery technology with Uber's expansive platform and logistics proficiency, promising a seamless end-to-end experience. This showcases Uber's first investment in drone delivery, signaling a innovative move towards the future of transportation.

data.title: Blue Yonder improves Transportation Management solution to tackle industry challenges, aiming to reduce costs, meet service levels, and minimize disruptions.
data.description: In the bustling city of Dallas, the transportation sector is experiencing increased challenges in balancing costs, service levels, and emission reduction targets amid disruptions such as tariffs and geopolitical changes. Blue Yonder is addressing these issues by improving its top-notch Transportation Management solution to meet the evolving demands of the industry. This update aims to help companies navigate the pressures of the supply chain environment by providing a multi-enterprise solution.

data.title: Locality Bank and Parlay Finance team up; utilizing AI for SBA lending to boost efficiency.
data.description: Locality Bank in Fort Lauderdale, Florida has chosen Parlay Finance's AI-driven Loan Intelligence System to enhance their SBA lending process. This system will automate intake procedures and accelerate decision-making, leading to a more efficient lending process.

data.title: Genius Sports acquires Sports Innovation Lab to enhance fan activation platform, expanding media business. #GENI #SportsInnovationLab
data.description: Genius Sports Limited (NYSE:GENI) has recently acquired Sports Innovation Lab, a top player in sports fan data. This move is set to accelerate the growth of Genius Sports' media arm by merging unparalleled official game data with highly insightful fan intelligence. The acquisition signals a strategic advancement for Genius Sports as it strengthens its position in the global sports, betting, and media landscape. This move solidifies Genius Sports' commitment to enhancing its offerings and expanding its reach in the industry.

data.title: Udemy releases 2026 Global Learning & Skills Trends Report, based on data from 17,000 enterprise customers; only 1% feel ready for AI effects.
data.description: In San Francisco, Udemy (Nasdaq: UDMY), a prominent AI-driven skills acceleration platform, has unveiled its 2026 Global Learning & Skills Trends Report. Drawing from learning data of more than 17,000 Udemy enterprise clients, the report delves into key trends and sought-after skills influencing the workforce of tomorrow. While AI integration is on the rise, a mere 1% of employers, as per McKinsey research, believe they are adequately prepared for its implications. Notably, data from Udemy indicates that major firms such as Prodapt are at the forefront of this shift.

data.title: Heather Rubash appointed as CMO of Brinqa to drive enterprise growth in Austin with new vision.
data.description: Heather Rubash has been named the Chief Marketing Officer at Brinqa in Austin, Texas. This move is a part of the company's efforts to expand its executive leadership team.

data.title: NanoVibronix launched "Oscar" to boost ENvue adoption, offer training aid for clinicians. ($NAOV, NASDAQ)
data.description: In Tyler, Texas, NanoVibronix, Inc. unveiled Oscar, a novel training aid through its ENvue Medical division. The company, traded as NAOV on NASDAQ, specializes in non-invasive medical technology. Oscar aims to enhance naso-enteral feeding procedure training for clinicians and educators with its standardized, repeatable approach, tackling a significant adoption challenge in this field. This launch signals NanoVibronix's commitment to innovation and advancing medical education.

data.title: J.S. Held helps secure $24.4M refinancing for GRO-WELL Brands, a top green waste recycler in the Southwest.
data.description: A global consulting firm, J.S. Held, has reported that GRO-WELL® Brands, Inc., a prominent green waste recycling company in the Southwestern U.S., recently completed a refinancing worth $24.4 million on August 28, 2025. The refinancing was facilitated by Ares Commercial.

data.title: Diwali at Times Square will celebrate its 10th anniversary on Oct. 12, 2025, in partnership with San Francisco and Toronto.
data.description: The annual Diwali festival at Times Square will be back on October 12, 2025, marking its 10th anniversary at the iconic venue in New York City. The event will also involve San Francisco, California, and Toronto, Canada this year, representing a collaboration between major cities. This celebration at the largest hub in the world is expected to attract a significant audience and participants to partake in the cultural festivities and showcases.

data.title: ManpowerGroup releases 2024-2025 Sustainability Report focusing on a people-first transition, highlighting progress across their sustainability pillars.
data.description: In Milwaukee on September 18, 2025, ManpowerGroup unveiled its latest 2024-2025 Sustainability Report titled "Working to Change the World: A Human-First, Just Transition." This marks the fifth year of the report, showcasing advancements in ManpowerGroup's sustainability focus areas, including Planet, People, and Prosperity.
